description: Mexican criminal syndicate based in Jalisco, founded in 2009 as a split from the Milenio Cartel. Led by Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes (El Mencho) until his death in 2026, it is known for extreme violence, drug trafficking (cocaine and methamphetamine), and use of drones and RPGs. Considered the most powerful and dangerous drug cartel in Mexico, with a heavily militarized structure and operations across multiple states.

country_links.evidence_quote: the cartel has contacts in Colombia, Peru, Bolivia, the United States, Central America, Canada, Australia, China and Southeast Asia
country_links.context: The CJNG has contacts in Australia that help it control drug trafficking.
